energy_bill_type.title: Energy Type
energy_bill_type.description: Type of energy supply as shown on the bill (e.g., 'electricity', 'gas', 'dual').

energy_bill_provider_name.title: Provider Name
energy_bill_provider_name.description: Trading name of the energy provider (e.g., 'EnergyAustralia').

energy_bill_provider_abn.title: Provider ABN
energy_bill_provider_abn.description: Australian Business Number of the energy provider (e.g., '99 086 014 968').

energy_bill_account_holder_name.title: Account Holder Name
energy_bill_account_holder_name.description: Full name of the account holder as shown on the bill (e.g., 'Miss S Sample').

energy_bill_account_number.title: Account Number
energy_bill_account_number.description: Customer account number as shown on the bill (e.g., '1234 567 890').

energy_bill_nmi.title: National Metering Identifier (NMI)
energy_bill_nmi.description: 10-character electricity meter identifier assigned to the supply point (e.g., '1234567890'). Electricity only.

energy_bill_mirn.title: Meter Installation Reference Number (MIRN)
energy_bill_mirn.description: Gas meter identifier assigned to the supply point. Gas or dual only.

energy_bill_service_address.title: Service Address
energy_bill_service_address.description: Physical supply address used for Proof of Address verification.

street.title: Street
street.description: Street number and name (e.g., '37 Sample Road').

energy_bill_issue_date.title: Bill Issue Date
energy_bill_issue_date.description: Date the bill was issued (YYYY-MM-DD), used to verify document recency (e.g., '2023-08-04').

energy_bill_due_date.title: Bill Due Date
energy_bill_due_date.description: Payment due date (YYYY-MM-DD), used to confirm document validity (e.g., '2023-08-21').

energy_bill_total_amount_due.title: Total Amount Due (AUD)
energy_bill_total_amount_due.description: Total amount payable in AUD as shown on the bill (e.g., 538.77).

document_front.title: Bill Page Images
document_front.description: List of file paths for the original bill page images, in page order.

items.title: Image Path
items.description: File path of each bill page image (e.g., 'images/energy_bill_page001.png').
